2006 3111$1311 104(31), 3111131sz1 20073111331311? 1 3051 01/2007 ' (1) _. ”44 -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THEVGAZE'I'IE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [Pa-R: Héec. 3001 MINISTRY OF WATER RFSOURCES " NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 6th July, 2007 t 5.0. 1112 (E) .—Whereas, the Government of India in the Ministry of Water Resources vide its notification number 8.0, 16903) dated the 2nd April, 1986 constituted the Ravi and Beas Waters Tribunal for verification and adjudication of certain matters referred therein, and the said Tribunal forwarded its report to the Central Government on 30th January, 1987', And, whereas, further references have been made by the Central Government to the said Tribunal on 19th August, l987 requiring explanation and guidance on the report aforesaid; \ And, whereas, considering the enormous exercise undertaken by the said Tribunal in completing its further report, the Central Government extended the period of making the said report, from time to time. till the 5th August, 2007; And, whereas, the Central Government, keeping in View the exigencies of the work involved, as pointed out by the said Tribunal, considers it necessary to extend the said period for another six months after the 5th August, 2007; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by the proviso to Subsection (3) of Section 50f the Inter-State River Water Disputes Act, 1956 (33 of 1956), the Central Goverrunent hereby further extends the period, within which the Tribunal may forward its report on the references so made, to the Central Government till the 5th day of February, 2008, and for that purpose makes the following further amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Water Resources number 30. 905(5), dated the 5th August, 2003, namely :w In the said notification, in the last paragraph, for the words, figures and letters “till the 5th day of August, 2007", the words, figures and letters “till the 5th day of February, 2008” shall be substituted. [F. No.15/3/85-ITJ GAURI CHATTERJI, Secy, Note : The principal notification constituting the Ravi and Beas Waters Tribunal was published in the Gazette of India Vida ; number 3.0. 169(E), dated the 2nd April, l986 and subsequently amended vide number 5.0, 666(E), dated the-10th June, 2003; and the period within which the Tribunal was required to forward its further report to the Central Government was extended from time to time vide number 8.0. 90503), dated the 5th August, 2003; 5.0. 88903), dated the 5th August, 2004; 8.0. 166(E), dated the 4th February, 2005; SO. 109305), dated the 4th August, 2005; 3.0, 13305), dated the 3rd February, 2006; 3.0, 12l8(E), dated the 28th July, 2006 and SD. 10403), dated the 2nd February, 2007.
